PLOT_DETAILS.plot_layout: The main [CO2] plots were split into semi-circular halves that were well-watered (Wet) by replacement of potential evapotranspiration using a subsurface drip irrigation system (0.5 m tube spacing, 0.3 m emitter spacing, 0.2 m depth) or subjected to waterstress (Dry) by supplying  only 1/2 as much water at each irrigation
